title: Lyra-1 Source Models and Rendering

classes.name: LatentRecon
key_methods: forward_gaussians(images_input, plucker_embedding, rays_os, rays_ds, time_embeddings, num_input_multi_views) -> (Tensor[B,N,14], Tensor|None)
gaussian_processing(x: Tensor, rays_os: Tensor, rays_ds: Tensor) -> Tensor[B,N,14]
classes.notes: Gaussian layout: [B,N,14] = pos(0:3) + opacity(3:4) + scale(4:7) + rotation(7:11) + rgb(11:14). Conditional on opt.deferred_bp: uses GaussianRendererDeferred vs GaussianRenderer.

classes.name: GaussianRenderer
key_methods: render(gaussians: Tensor[B,N,14], cam_view: Tensor[B,V,4,4], bg_color=None, intrinsics=None) -> dict

classes.name: GaussianRendererDeferred
key_methods: render(gaussians, cam_view, bg_color, intrinsics, patch_size=None) -> dict
render_deferred(means3D, opacity, scales, rotations, rgbs, viewmat, Ks, backgrounds, H, W, near_plane, far_plane, patch_size) -> dict
render_standard(means3D, opacity, scales, rotations, rgbs, viewmat, Ks, backgrounds, H, W, near_plane, far_plane, patch_size) -> dict
classes.notes: Dispatches to DeferredBP.apply() (full image) or DeferredBPPatch.apply() (patch-based). Falls back to render_standard when opt.deferred_bp=False.

classes.name: DeferredBP
key_methods: render(xyz, feature, scale, rotation, opacity, test_w2c, test_intr, W, H, near_plane, far_plane, backgrounds, raster_kwargs) -> (image, alpha, depth)  [static]
forward(ctx, xyz, feature, scale, rotation, opacity, test_w2cs, test_intr, W, H, near_plane, far_plane, backgrounds, raster_kwargs) -> (images[B,V,H,W,3], alphas, depths)  [static]
classes.notes: Deferred backprop: forward runs no_grad over all views, backward re-runs rasterization per view with enable_grad for gradient accumulation. Decouples fwd/bwd memory usage.

classes.name: DeferredBPPatch
key_methods: forward(ctx, xyz, features, scaling, rotation, opacity, C2W, Ks, width, height, near_plane, far_plane, backgrounds, patch_size, raster_kwargs) -> (colors[B,V,3,H,W], alphas, depths)  [static]
classes.notes: Patch-based variant: decomposes H×W into patch tiles, renders each patch independently via shifted camera principal point (cx, cy offsets). Reduces peak GPU memory.

classes.name: Provider
key_methods: _preprocess(file_name, rgbs, c2ws, intrinsics, depths, timesteps, latents, target_index, num_input_multi_views) -> dict
classes.returns: _preprocess() -> dict with keys: images_output, intrinsics, cam_view, time_embeddings, c2ws_input, intrinsics_input, plucker_embedding, rays_os, rays_ds, flip_flag, file_name, target_index, num_input_multi_views

classes.name: BaseDataset
key_methods: read(video_idx, frame_idxs, view_idxs, data_fields) -> dict[DataField, Any]  [concrete]

classes.name: Radym
classes.data_fields_supported: IMAGE_RGB, CAMERA_C2W_TRANSFORM, CAMERA_INTRINSICS, METRIC_DEPTH, DYNAMIC_INSTANCE_MASK, BACKWARD_FLOW, OBJECT_BBOX, CAPTION, LATENT_RGB
classes.notes: Reads MP4 (via decord.VideoReader), depth EXR from zip, poses/intrinsics from .npz. Uses LRU cache for zip file handles.

classes.name: RadymWrapper
key_methods: get_data(idx, data_fields, frame_indices, view_indices, camera_convention) -> dict
classes.notes: Adapter bridging Radym's BaseDataset API to the API expected by Provider (count_frames, count_cameras, get_data, sample_list, is_static).

classes.name: DataField
key_attributes: CAPTION, OBJECT_BBOX, TRAJECTORY, LANGUAGE_EMBEDDING, RAY_DIRECTION, POINT_CLOUD, META_DATA

key_relationships: LatentRecon composes GaussianRenderer OR GaussianRendererDeferred (self.gs, conditional on opt.deferred_bp)
GaussianRendererDeferred uses DeferredBPPatch (patch-based deferred autograd, when patch_size!=None)
Provider uses DataField (enum for data key names)
LatentRecon uses Provider (data consumption via data dict keys)
LatentRecon uses ConvTranspose3dFactorized / MultiStageConvTranspose3d / ConvTranspose3dReduced (from src.models.utils.model)
forward_flow: get_item -> _preprocess() -> returns data dict with images, cameras, plucker, time embeddings
forward_gaussians: patch_embed -> +plucker_embed -> +time_embed -> enc_blocks -> enc_norm -> deconv/decoder_cosmos -> gaussian_processing() -> gaussian_pruning()
gaussian_processing: split x into distance/rgb/scale/rotation/opacity -> apply activations -> cat [pos, opacity, scale, rotation, rgb]
forward: gs.render(gaussians, cam_view, bg_color, intrinsics) -> returns images_pred, depths_pred, alphas_pred
GaussianRendererDeferred.render -> render_deferred(patch_size=None) -> DeferredBP.apply() OR render_deferred(patch_size) -> DeferredBPPatch.apply()
important_notes: DeferredBP: forward() uses no_grad for all views, backward() re-renders each view with enable_grad to accumulate Gaussian attribute gradients. Decouples forward and backward memory.
DeferredBPPatch: patches the image plane by shifting camera principal point (cx - m*patch_w, cy - n*patch_h) and rendering sub-images of size patch_size.
Provider supports both static (multi-view images) and dynamic (video) datasets via is_static flag.
Provider uses dataset_registry to look up dataset class, kwargs, scene_scale, max/min_gap.
RadymWrapper.is_static controls whether Provider calls _get_indices_static or _get_indices_dynamic.
Latent mode: Provider can load pre-computed VAE latents (load_latents=True) instead of raw RGB. Cosmos latents are denormalized before use.
LatentRecon supports optional Cosmos VAE decoder (use_cosmos_decoder) to decode latents to higher resolution before Gaussian output.
Multi-view handling: multiple input cameras are folded into the batch/temporal dimension during encoding, then merged into one Gaussian set.
